summary: Audited 1 page with an overall score of 77 out of 100. Found 2 issues: 1 critical, 0 major, 1 minor. This build has 1 critical issue that requires immediate attention.

findings.title: Images must have alternative text
findings.description: Images without alt text are invisible to screen reader users.
findings.recommendation: Add a descriptive alt attribute to each image, or alt="" for decorative images.

findings.title: Skipped heading level
findings.description: Heading level skipped from h1 to h3.
findings.recommendation: Use heading levels in sequential order without skipping levels.

prioritized_fixes.title: Fix 1 critical accessibility issue
prioritized_fixes.description: 1 critical accessibility finding that should be addressed.

prioritized_fixes.title: Fix 1 minor semantic HTML issue
prioritized_fixes.description: 1 minor semantic finding that should be addressed.
